name: Odoo Mail & Communication Framework
description: Expert knowledge of Odoo's mail, discuss, and notification framework including mail.thread, mail.activity.mixin, mail templates, email routing, bounce handling, notifications, and chatter.

capabilities.name: mail.thread
capabilities.description: Message tracking, notifications, followers, subtypes, routing, bounce handling. Key methods: message_post, message_subscribe, message_route_process, _routing_handle_bounce.

capabilities.name: Mail Activities
capabilities.description: mail.activity.mixin, activity plans, activity types, scheduling, calendar integration, deadline management.

capabilities.name: Email Templates
capabilities.description: QWeb-based email templates, template inheritance, dynamic placeholders, AI prompt integration, render engine.

capabilities.name: Notifications
capabilities.description: In-app notifications, email notifications, SMS notifications, push notifications, digest emails.

capabilities.name: Bounce Handling
capabilities.description: Inbound email routing, bounce detection, auto-blacklist after 5 bounces/3 months, failure type classification (mail_bounce, mail_spam, mail_smtp, etc.).
